sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: U.S. Gold Corp raises $31M to advance gold project - ICYMI
feed.summary: U.S. Gold Corp (NASDAQ:USAU) successfully raised $31.2 million in a capital raise, driven by strong demand from gold-focused investment funds. Chairman Luke Norman stated this financing validates investor confidence in their permitted, shovel-ready gold and copper project. The company plans to begin site activity in January and move towards production, potentially exploring opportunities to add additional ounces to their existing deposit.

feed.title: Sandisk Corporation Stock (NASDAQ: SNDK) After the Close: Latest Price Action, News Drivers, Analyst Forecasts, and What to Watch Before Monday
feed.summary: Sandisk Corporation (NASDAQ: SNDK) closed Friday trading near $250.05, experiencing an intraday reversal from an opening high of $259.01. The stock's performance reflects a balance between year-end profit-taking and strong fundamental tailwinds from tight NAND supply and surging AI data-center demand. Analysts view Sandisk as a pivotal AI infrastructure play, driven by its recent independence, S&P 500 inclusion, and robust datacenter growth, with future returns dependent on execution against elevated expectations.
